/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/saba_viewer.dir/saba_viewer.cpp.o -o saba_viewer  viewer/libSabaViewer.a -ldl src/libSaba.a -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath -lBulletSoftBody gobot/libgobot.a external/fcpp/libfcpp.a -lGL -lGLU external/lua/liblua.a -lglfw -lX11 -ldl -lXrandr -lXinerama -lXcursor -lXrandr -lXinerama -lXcursor -lXxf86vm
